events.statement: DEFINE EVENT OVERWRITE order_created ON TABLE order WHEN $event = 'CREATE' THEN { CREATE audit SET table = 'order', action = 'create', record = $after.id, time = time::now() };

DEFINE EVENT OVERWRITE order_updated ON TABLE order WHEN $event = 'UPDATE' AND $before.status != $after.status THEN { CREATE audit SET table = 'order', action = 'status_change', record = $after.id, old_status = $before.status, new_status = $after.status, time = time::now() };
